feat.name: Scaly Hide
feat.text: You were born with a layer of scales across your entire body that resemble those of your draconic progenitor. When you’re unarmored, the scales give you a +1 item bonus to AC with a Dexterity cap of +3. The item bonus to AC increases to +2 at 5th level. The item bonus to AC from these scales is cumulative with *armor potency runes* on your explorer's clothing, the *mystic armor* spell, or *bands of force*.

traits.name: Dragonblood
traits.text: A creature with this trait has the dragonblood versatile heritage. These creatures are born of draconic lineage and often have draconic appearances.

feat.special: You can select this feat only at 1st level, and you can't retrain into or out of this feat.
